Pipe Testing variables.comment_radius: Inner and outer radius of the pipe [m]
Pipe Testing variables.comment_density: Density of the pipe material and its insulation layer [kg/m^3]
Pipe Testing variables.comment_cp: Specific heat capacity of the pipe material and its insulation layer[J/kgK]
Pipe Testing variables.comment_k: Heat conductivity of the pipe material and insulation layer [W/mK], heat conductivity of pipe is neglibible
Pipe Testing variables.comment_h_pipe_air: Natural convection from the outer surface of the pipe to the surrounding air [W/mK]
